channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 momenbasel/PureMac (3809 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: momenbasel

📝 Repository: momenbasel/PureMac

📄 Descrizione: Free, open-source macOS cleaner. CleanMyMac alternative with zero telemetry. Native SwiftUI, scheduled auto-cleaning, Xcode/Homebrew/system cache cleanup. MIT licensed.

⭐ Stelle: 3809

🍴 Forks: 204

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: cache-cleaner cleanmymac cleanup disk-cleaner disk-space homebrew mac-utility macos macos-app macos-cleaner macosx native oss osx privacy swift swiftui system-cleaner xcode-cleaner

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-08T12:59:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-07T05:08:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 dodo-reach/hermes-desktop (1040 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: dodo-reach

📝 Repository: dodo-reach/hermes-desktop

🍴 Forks: 67

item.title: 📝 Octane0411/open-vibe-island (843 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Octane0411

📝 Repository: Octane0411/open-vibe-island

📄 Descrizione: The open-source alternative to vibe-island, designed for heavy code agent users, supporting cc/codex/opencode, terminal/ghostty/cmux/kaku/iterm. 开源的vibe-island替代品，为重度code agent用户设计，支持cc/codex/opencode, terminal/ghostty/cmux/kaku/iterm

⭐ Stelle: 843

🍴 Forks: 144

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-01T02:07:41Z

item.description:
👤 Owner: awizemann

📝 Repository: awizemann/harness
